jobs.title: Computer Vision Scientist/Data Scientist
key_matches: Hands-on experience with machine learning and computer vision frameworks (e.g. PyTorch, OpenCV)
Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals
key_gaps: Experience deploying machine learning models into production
Familiarity with cloud platforms, containerisation, or MLOps tooling
jobs.rationale: Ben has strong qualifications in Python, machine learning, and relevant frameworks like PyTorch and OpenCV, but lacks specific experience in deploying models into production and familiarity with MLOps tooling.
jobs.job_summary: The role involves developing and deploying computer vision models for a small AI startup, focusing on end-to-end AI solutions and collaboration with engineers. The candidate will take ownership of computer vision problems from exploration to production deployment.
top_qualifications: Experience in data science, machine learning, or a related role with exposure to computer vision
Hands-on experience with machine learning and computer vision frameworks (e.g. PyTorch, TensorFlow, OpenCV)

jobs.title: Data Scientist - Remote
key_gaps: Experience in building and validating predictive models

Proficiency in programming languages such as Python
Strong data modeling skills with experience in building and validating predictive models

Hands-on experience with deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch
Solid understanding of data preprocessing and annotation best practices
